<path>/home/uzer/marketing-hub/src/lib/marketing-tests/exams.ts</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>
2629: export interface CustomExamSpec {
2630:   title: string;
2631:   description: string;
2632:   passingScore: number;
2633:   durationMinutes: number;
2634:   domains?: string[];
2635:   levels?: Array<"associate" | "professional" | "expert">;
2636:   difficulties?: Difficulty[];
2637:   skills?: string[];
2638:   ids?: string[];
2639:   maxQuestions?: number;
2640:   seed?: number;
2641: }
2642: 
2643: // Seeded RNG (mulberry32) for deterministic custom-exam selection.
2644: function mulberry32(seed: number): () => number {
2645:   let a = seed >>> 0;
2646:   return function () {
2647:     a |= 0; a = (a + 0x6d2b79f5) | 0;
2648:     let t = Math.imul(a ^ (a >>> 15), 1 | a);
2649:     t = (t + Math.imul(t ^ (t >>> 7), 61 | t)) ^ t;
2650:     return ((t ^ (t >>> 14)) >>> 0) / 4294967296;
2651:   };
2652: }
2653: 
2654: export function buildCustomExam(spec: CustomExamSpec): Exam {
2655:   const pool: Question[] = [];
2656:   for (const exam of EXAMS) {
2657:     for (const q of exam.questions) {
2658:       if (spec.domains && !spec.domains.includes(exam.domain)) continue;
2659:       if (spec.levels && !spec.levels.includes(exam.level)) continue;
2660:       if (spec.difficulties && !spec.difficulties.includes(q.difficulty)) continue;
2661:       if (spec.skills && !spec.skills.includes(q.skill)) continue;
2662:       if (spec.ids && !spec.ids.includes(q.id)) continue;
2663:       pool.push(q);
2664:     }
2665:   }
2666:   const rng = spec.seed != null ? mulberry32(spec.seed) : Math.random;
2667:   for (let i = pool.length - 1; i > 0; i--) {
2668:     const j = Math.floor(rng() * (i + 1));
2669:     const tmp = pool[i]!; pool[i] = pool[j]!; pool[j] = tmp;
2670:   }
2671:   const max = spec.maxQuestions != null ? spec.maxQuestions : pool.length;
2672:   const chosen = pool.slice(0, Math.min(max, pool.length));
2673:   const id = `custom-${fnv1aHex(spec.title + JSON.stringify(spec))}`;
2674:   const domain = chosen.length > 0
2675:     ? (EXAMS.find((e) => e.questions.includes(chosen[0]!))?.domain ?? "Custom")
2676:     : "Custom";
2677:   const level: Exam["level"] =
2678:     spec.levels && spec.levels.length === 1 ? spec.levels[0]! : "professional";
2679:   return {
2680:     id,
2681:     title: spec.title,
2682:     domain,
2683:     description: spec.description,
2684:     durationMinutes: spec.durationMinutes,
2685:     passingScore: spec.passingScore,
2686:     level,
2687:     questions: chosen,
2688:   };
2689: }
2690: 
2691: // All distinct skills across the question pool (for the builder UI).
2692: export function allSkills(): string[] {
2693:   const set = new Set<string>();
2694:   for (const exam of EXAMS) for (const q of exam.questions) set.add(q.skill);
2695:   return Array.from(set).sort();
2696: }
2697: 
2698: // All distinct domains across EXAMS.
2699: export function allDomains(): string[] {
2700:   return Array.from(new Set(EXAMS.map((e) => e.domain))).sort();
2701: }
2702: 
2703: // ── Per-question analytics + discrimination index ──

Instructions from: /home/uzer/marketing-hub/AGENTS.md
# AGENTS.md — Marketing Hub (marketing-hub)

Marketing Hub — All-in-One Marketing Command Center. A Next.js + React application.

## Stack
- Next.js + React (28 dependencies)
- `next.config.js`, `components.json` (shadcn-style UI), Capacitor (`capacitor.config.json`
  → mobile packaging), Tailwind/CSS
- `data/` and `docs/` hold content and documentation

## Common commands
- `npm run dev` — local dev server
- `npm run build` — production build
- `npm run start` — serve the production build
- `npm run lint` — lint
- `npm run seed` — seed local data

## Notes for the coding agent (pi)
- pi is the coding agent for this project.
- **The working tree is heavily modified (~119 uncommitted changes).** Do NOT run
  dependency upgrades, `git reset`, or branch-switching here without explicit
  confirmation — checkpoint first (commit or a safety branch) before destructive ops.
- Prefer small, targeted edits over broad refactors until the tree is committed.
- This project had 0 known vulnerabilities and 17 outdated deps at last audit.
</system-reminder>
